content: By integrating an ICM curiosity mechanism fine-tuned for 2025 autonomous industrial agents into WinCLIP’s zero-/few-shot anomaly detection pipeline, the agent can proactively seek out novel, unseen defect types that WinCLIP would miss under its default zero-shot setting. This turns passive industrial quality inspection into an active, self-improving process that automatically expands the anomaly distribution as new defect types emerge.
